data.description:
## Description

**What**: Run >=3 brainstorm sessions using the updated brainstorm Phase 1 Gate (S2) and inference-challenge mode (S3) to observe whether META_QUESTION signals surface and produce non-default user responses.

**Why**: SC6 requires empirical evidence that the forcing function produces real course-corrections, not rubber-stamps. This story is observational — no code changes are made; it validates end-to-end behavior.

**Scope**:
- IN: Execute >=3 brainstorm sessions after S2 and S3 are merged; capture PRECONDITIONS events with signal_type=META_QUESTION; confirm >=1 META_QUESTION results in user_answer != null with a non-default response; document evidence (PRECONDITIONS event references)
- OUT: Any code changes (this story is observational/validation only); implementation of S2, S3 (already done by their stories); recall/precision measurement (S4)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, >=3 brainstorm sessions have been run with the updated Phase 1 Gate and inference-challenge mode active; their PRECONDITIONS events are accessible via the ticket system
  ← Satisfies: "dogfooding sprint covering >=3 brainstorm sessions" (SC6)
- When this story is complete, >=1 META_QUESTION signal surfaced during the dogfooding sessions with user_answer != null and a non-default response documented in a ticket comment
  ← Satisfies: ">=1 user-visible META_QUESTION prompt is surfaced that the user answers with a non-default response" (SC6)

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Requires S2 (Phase 1 Gate completeness attestation) and S3 (inference-challenge mode) to be fully merged and deployed before dogfooding can begin — this story cannot start until those are closed
- Non-code story; no unit tests required. Done definitions are observational outcomes.

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
data.title: As a planning workflow author, dogfooding validation confirms that META_QUESTION signals surface real course-corrections during live brainstorm sessions
